name: Salesforce
description: Enterprise CRM platform with the broadest API ecosystem in CRM
gating_details: Free Developer Edition org with full API access. Production requires paid license but dev tiers are free.
main_blocker: Complex auth setup (multiple OAuth flows, IP ranges) and API rate limits. Broad surface but needs careful scope management.

name: HubSpot
description: All-in-one CRM, marketing, sales, and service platform with extensive API
gating_details: Free developer account with API access. Paid plans needed for higher rate limits and some endpoints.
main_blocker: Rate limits on free tier (250 req/10sec). Some objects require paid subscriptions. Broad API needs careful scoping.

name: Pipedrive
description: Sales pipeline CRM with focused deal management API
gating_details: Free trial available with API access. Paid plans start at $12.50/month.
main_blocker: Smaller API surface than HubSpot/Salesforce. Limited to CRM functions only.

name: Attio
description: Modern, flexible CRM with a developer-first REST API and MCP server
gating_details: Free tier available with API access. Paid plans for higher usage.
main_blocker: Relatively newer platform, API is still maturing. Fewer integrations than incumbents.

name: Twenty
description: Open-source CRM with REST + GraphQL APIs, self-hostable
gating_details: Open-source, completely free to self-host. Twenty Cloud has free tier.
main_blocker: Younger project, API still evolving. Fewer endpoints than Salesforce/HubSpot but growing fast.

name: Podio
description: Citrix-owned customizable work management platform with REST API
gating_details: Free tier available. But platform is in maintenance mode under Citrix - new developer signups may be restricted.
main_blocker: Under Citrix, in maintenance mode. Platform may not be actively developed. Risk of deprecation.

name: Zoho CRM
description: Zoho's CRM offering part of a larger Zoho ecosystem with broad APIs
gating_details: Free tier available (3 users). Developer accounts easy to create. Paid plans for more users/features.
main_blocker: API documentation quality varies. Zoho ecosystem has many independent APIs that don't always work well together.

name: Close
description: Inside sales CRM with built-in calling, email, and SMS
gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans start affordably. Developer docs open to all.
main_blocker: API covers CRM operations well but is focused on Close's specific model (leads, activities, call tracking).

name: Copper
description: CRM designed for Google Workspace users with REST API
gating_details: Free trial available. Full API access may require paid plan. Some endpoints restricted.
main_blocker: API not as broad as Salesforce/HubSpot. Strong in Google Workspace integration, weaker elsewhere.

name: DealCloud
description: Private equity and investment CRM with comprehensive REST API
gating_details: Enterprise-focused platform. Requires partnership or paid plan. No free developer tier.
main_blocker: Enterprise-gated. No self-serve API access. Must be a DealCloud customer with a paid plan.

name: Zendesk
description: Leading customer service platform with extensive REST API
gating_details: Free trial (30 days) available. Developer account with sandbox. Paid plans required for production.
main_blocker: Rate limits on trial. Some endpoints require specific Zendesk plans. Broad API needs scope management.

name: Intercom
description: Customer communications platform with REST API and AI agents
gating_details: Free trial available. Developer hub accessible. Paid plans for production use.
main_blocker: API rate limits. Some data (conversations, articles) has pagination limits.

name: Freshdesk
description: Cloud-based customer support software with REST API
gating_details: Free tier (Sprout) available. Developer portal open. Paid plans start at $15/month.
main_blocker: No OAuth2 - uses Basic Auth with API key, less secure. API surface is adequate but not as broad as Zendesk.

name: Front
description: Shared inbox platform for teams with REST API
gating_details: Free trial available. Full API access requires paid plan. Developer docs available.
main_blocker: API covers shared inbox operations well but may lack depth in some areas.

name: Pylon
description: Customer support platform designed for B2B SaaS, with chat and ticketing
gating_details: Early-stage product. Free trial available but API documentation may be limited. Growing platform.
main_blocker: Newer platform with limited API documentation and smaller endpoint surface. API may still be evolving.

name: LiveAgent
description: Help desk and live chat platform with REST API
gating_details: Free trial (30 days) available. Paid plans start at $9/month. API available on all plans.
main_blocker: API is functional but documentation quality varies. Not as well-known as Zendesk/Intercom.

name: Plain
description: Modern B2B customer support platform with GraphQL API
gating_details: Free trial available. Modern platform with good developer docs. API accessible from trial.
main_blocker: GraphQL-only (not REST). Smaller ecosystem but well-designed API. Newer platform.

name: Help Scout
description: Simple, customer-focused help desk with REST and Docs APIs
gating_details: Free trial available. Developer docs open to all. Paid plans for production use.
main_blocker: Basic Auth with API key (no OAuth2). Two separate APIs that could be unified. Smaller surface than Zendesk.

name: Gorgias
description: Ecommerce help desk platform with multi-channel support and REST API
gating_details: Free trial available. Building a public app requires signing up for developer partnership. API docs accessible.
main_blocker: Public app development requires partnership approval. Private API keys available but with limits.

name: Gladly
description: Customer service platform focused on conversation-centric support
gating_details: Enterprise-focused. No self-serve developer trial. Requires becoming a customer or partner.
main_blocker: Enterprise-gated. Limited public API documentation. Requires paid Gladly account for API access.

name: Slack
description: Team communication platform with comprehensive APIs, Events API, and Modals
gating_details: Free Slack workspace for development. App creation in API portal is free. No paid account needed for dev.
main_blocker: Complex OAuth scope system. Event subscriptions need verification. Socket Mode vs RTM decisions. Rate limits per workspace.

name: Twilio
description: Cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, video, and email via REST APIs
auth_methods: API Key;Basic Auth (Account SID + Auth Token)
gating_details: Free trial credits ($15) on signup. Pay-as-you-go. No approval needed to start building.
main_blocker: Complex product family (SendGrid, Segment, Twilio proper). Each has different API. Trial limited to verified numbers.

name: Zoho Cliq
description: Zoho's team messaging and collaboration platform
gating_details: Free tier available (limited users). Zoho developer account is free. Part of Zoho ecosystem.
main_blocker: Documentation is less polished than Slack/Discord. Tied to Zoho ecosystem.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
description: ByteDance's enterprise collaboration platform with open APIs
gating_details: Free developer account at open.larksuite.com. App creation is free. Some endpoints may need enterprise plan.
main_blocker: Two-level auth (tenant + user) adds complexity. Documentation primarily in English but some gaps. China vs International versions differ.

name: Pumble
description: Free team chat app with file sharing, no paid tier needed for full features
gating_details: Free to use. But API documentation is scarce - platform is relatively new.
main_blocker: Very limited or no public REST API. Primarily a webhook consumer. Not suitable for agent toolkit without API expansion.

name: Discord
description: Gaming-adjacent chat platform with comprehensive REST API, Gateway, and Interactions
gating_details: Free developer portal. Create applications and bots without payment. No paid verification needed for basic bot.
main_blocker: Rate limits are strict (50 req/sec per bot). Gateway connections for real-time. Some endpoints (message history) paginated.

name: Telegram
description: Secure messaging platform with open Bot API and MTProto protocol
gating_details: Completely free. Create unlimited bots via @BotFather. No paid tier for API access.
main_blocker: Bot Token only (no OAuth for user accounts). No webhook by default - needs polling or webhook setup. Polling architecture less standard.

name: WhatsApp Business
description: Meta's business messaging platform with Cloud API and On-Premises API
gating_details: Free tier available (1,000 conversations/month). Meta Developer account needed. Business Verification may be required.
main_blocker: Business verification required for production. Message templates need approval. Opt-in model before messaging users.

name: Aircall
description: Cloud-based phone system for sales and support teams with REST API
gating_details: Free trial available. API access included in paid plans. No free developer-only tier.
main_blocker: API access requires paid account. Webhook-based for real-time events. Voice data (recordings) has privacy restrictions.

name: Vonage
description: Cloud communications (SMS, Voice, Verify, Video) with REST APIs and SDKs
gating_details: Free trial credit (€2) on signup. Pay-as-you-go after. No approval needed for development.
main_blocker: Multiple auth models (API Key, JWT, HMAC) for different products. Trial credit limited. Number provisioning for voice needs verification.

name: Google Ads
description: Google's advertising platform with comprehensive REST API
gating_details: Free Google Ads manager account needed. Developer token is free but needs application for production access. Test accounts available.
main_blocker: Developer token approval process can take days/weeks. OAuth setup is complex (Google Cloud project, consent screen). API has steep learning curve.

name: Meta Ads
description: Facebook and Instagram advertising APIs via Meta Marketing API
gating_details: Meta Developer account is free. But many Marketing API endpoints require App Review + Business Verification. Test users available.
main_blocker: App Review process is notorious. Many endpoints need business verification. API versioning is aggressive (versions deprecated).

name: LinkedIn Ads
description: LinkedIn's B2B advertising and marketing APIs under Microsoft
gating_details: Free developer account. Marketing API access requires LinkedIn Page admin + Business verification. Application process.
main_blocker: Multi-level approval: Azure AD app, LinkedIn API access form, Business verification. Heavy documentation. Slower to get access than Google/Meta.

name: GoHighLevel
description: All-in-one marketing and sales platform for agencies with REST API
gating_details: Paid subscription required ($97+/month). No free developer tier. API accessible on all plans.
main_blocker: No free tier - requires paid subscription. API key-based auth (no OAuth2). Documentation quality is inconsistent.

name: Mailchimp
description: Email marketing platform with REST API and marketing automation
gating_details: Free tier available (500 contacts, 1,000 emails/month). Developer account easy to create.
main_blocker: API keys are datacenter-specific (different base URLs per key). Rate limits on free tier. Some endpoints require higher plans.

name: Klaviyo
description: Ecommerce marketing automation platform with REST API
gating_details: Free tier available (up to 250 contacts). API accessible on free plan.
main_blocker: Public/private key model is unusual. API is ecommerce-focused. Rate limits on free tier.

name: systeme.io
description: All-in-one marketing funnel builder with email marketing and sales features
gating_details: Free tier available (limited features). Paid plans for more functionality.
main_blocker: Limited API documentation and endpoint surface. API may not cover all platform features. Smaller platform ecosystem.

name: Pinterest
description: Visual discovery platform with REST API for pins, boards, and ads
gating_details: Free developer account. App creation is free. Some endpoints (Ads API) require business account.
main_blocker: Different scopes for organic vs ads API. App Review needed for some access levels. API is read/write but limited on write for some objects.

name: Threads (Meta)
description: Meta's text-based conversation app with limited public API
gating_details: Free Meta Developer account. Threads API is in development/preview. Limited endpoints available.
main_blocker: Threads API is very new and limited. Currently supports posting and basic read. No ads API, no analytics API yet.

name: SendGrid
description: Twilio's email delivery service with REST API and SMTP
gating_details: Free tier (100 emails/day forever). Pay-as-you-go for more. Twilio account needed.
main_blocker: API key only (no OAuth2). Email sending requires domain authentication (SPF, DKIM). Suppression management. Template management needs API calls.

name: Shopify
description: Leading ecommerce platform with comprehensive GraphQL and REST APIs
gating_details: Free development stores for building apps. Partner account is free. No credit card needed for dev stores.
main_blocker: OAuth scope negotiation is complex. GraphQL has rate limits based on cost model. REST API being deprecated in favor of GraphQL.

name: WooCommerce
description: Open-source WordPress ecommerce plugin with REST API
gating_details: Open-source. Self-hosted, so full control. WordPress + WooCommerce are free. API always available.
main_blocker: OAuth1.0a (legacy) auth with signature generation. Self-hosted means varying reliability. WordPress dependency.

name: BigCommerce
description: SaaS ecommerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs
gating_details: Free trial available. Dev sandbox for building. Paid plans for production.
main_blocker: API versioning can be confusing (V2 vs V3 for different resources). Some endpoints require specific plan levels.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
description: Enterprise ecommerce platform by Salesforce with REST and SOAP APIs
gating_details: Enterprise Salesforce product. Requires Salesforce account/contract. Developer sandbox available for customers.
main_blocker: Enterprise-gated. Requires Salesforce Commerce Cloud license (very expensive). No free developer tier for Commerce Cloud specifically.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
description: Adobe's enterprise ecommerce platform with REST API
gating_details: Magento Open Source is free. Adobe Commerce (Enterprise) requires license. Development instances are free to set up.
main_blocker: Architecture complexity (many module-specific APIs). Integration tokens need admin setup. Open source vs Commerce split causes confusion.

name: Squarespace
description: Website builder and commerce platform with REST API
gating_details: Developer portal available. API access requires Squarespace account. Some endpoints require paid plan.
main_blocker: API surface is limited compared to Shopify/BigCommerce. Focused on basic commerce operations. Not a full ecommerce platform API.

name: Ecwid
description: Lightweight ecommerce widgets with REST API
gating_details: Free tier available (up to 10 products). Paid plans for more features.
main_blocker: Smaller platform with fewer integrations. API is functional but less documented than Shopify.

name: Gumroad
description: Platform for creators to sell digital products with REST API
gating_details: Free to start (Gumroad takes cut). No monthly fee on free plan. Developer docs accessible.
main_blocker: Smaller API surface focused on products, sales, and subscribers. Not a full ecommerce platform.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
description: Amazon's seller API platform for managing listings, orders, and reports
gating_details: Free to join Selling Partner program. Requires Amazon Seller Central account. Professional seller account ($39.99/month) needed for API access.
main_blocker: Extremely complex auth setup (AWS IAM + SP API + LWAA). Professional seller account required. Rate limits are strict and quota-based.

name: fanbasis
description: Platform for creators and fan communities (limited public information)
gating_details: Unknown - the platform appears to be a smaller/niche player. Limited public dev portal.
main_blocker: Very limited public API documentation. Unclear if a public API exists for third-party development.

name: DataForSEO
description: SEO and rank tracking data API with comprehensive search data endpoints
gating_details: Pay-as-you-go model. Free trial with $50 credit on signup. No approval needed.
main_blocker: Custom auth flow (not standard OAuth2). Pay-per-query pricing model. API is data-only, no write operations.

name: SE Ranking
description: SEO platform with rank tracking, keyword research, and competitor analysis APIs
gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans required for ongoing API access.
main_blocker: Smaller platform, less documentation than DataForSEO. API key only (no OAuth2).

name: Ahrefs
description: SEO toolset with backlink analysis, keyword research, and site audit APIs
gating_details: Paid plans required ($99+/month). No free tier for API. Trial available.
main_blocker: Relatively expensive API access ($99+/month). Read-only API (data analysis, no write). API key only.

name: MrScraper
description: No-code web scraping platform with API access
gating_details: Free tier available (limited credits). Pay-as-you-go for more.
main_blocker: API is focused on triggering scrapes and retrieving results. Limited to the scraping platform's capabilities.

name: Apify
description: Web scraping and automation platform with extensive API and pre-built actors
gating_details: Free tier (platform credits, limited compute). Pay-as-you-go for more. Developer account is free.
main_blocker: Token-based auth (no OAuth2). Actor ecosystem is broad but inconsistent in quality. Compute costs for large scrapes.

name: Firecrawl
description: API for converting websites to clean markdown (built for AI/LLM consumption)
gating_details: Free tier (500 credits). Pay-as-you-go. Open-source option available.
main_blocker: Narrow API surface (crawl, scrape, map). Purpose-built tool, not general platform.

name: Bright Data
description: Enterprise web data platform with proxy networks, scraping browser, and datasets
gating_details: Free trial available. Pay-as-you-go pricing. Enterprise for large-scale.
main_blocker: Premium pricing for production. Proxy infrastructure is complex. Data collector builder is a platform of its own.

name: Sherlock
description: Open-source CLI tool for finding usernames across social networks (not an API platform)
gating_details: Open-source, free. Self-hosted CLI tool. No cloud API.
main_blocker: Sherlock is a CLI tool, not an API platform. No cloud API to integrate with. Runs as local Python.

name: Waterfall.io
description: Company and contact intelligence platform for sales data enrichment
gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans for ongoing API access.
main_blocker: Narrow API - mainly company/contact lookups. Paid plan required for meaningful use.

name: Clay
description: Data enrichment and sales intelligence platform with multi-source data merging
gating_details: Free tier (limited credits). Paid plans for more. Growing API surface.
main_blocker: API key auth (no OAuth2). Pricing can be high for volume use. Rapidly evolving product.

name: GitHub
description: Code hosting platform with comprehensive REST and GraphQL APIs
auth_methods: OAuth2;Personal Access Token;GitHub App Token;OAuth Device Flow
gating_details: Free tier with full API access. Higher rate limits on paid plans. No approval needed.
main_blocker: Multiple auth models can be confusing. GraphQL is preferred for production. PAT fine-grained scoping needs careful management.

name: Vercel
description: Frontend deployment and hosting platform with REST API
gating_details: Free tier (Hobby plan) with API access. Paid plans for team features.
main_blocker: API is deployment-focused (deployments, domains, projects). Some endpoints require team plan.

name: Netlify
description: Web hosting and serverless platform with REST API
gating_details: Free tier with API access. Paid plans for team features.
main_blocker: Smaller API than Vercel. Some endpoints (analytics, functions logs) have limited surface.

name: Cloudflare
description: CDN, security, and developer platform with extensive REST API
gating_details: Free tier with API access. Many endpoints available on free plan. Paid plans for advanced features.
main_blocker: Very broad API with many product-specific areas (DNS, Workers, D1, R2, etc.). API tokens need careful scope management. Free tier rate limits.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL, REST, GraphQL, and Realtime APIs
gating_details: Free tier (500MB database, 2GB bandwidth). Developer account free. Open-source.
main_blocker: Multiple key types (anon vs service role) can be confusing. Service role key gives full access - must be kept secret.

name: Neo4j
description: Graph database platform with Cypher query API and REST endpoints
gating_details: Free tier (AuraDB: 50k nodes). Community edition self-hosted is free. Developer account free.
main_blocker: Primary API is Cypher query language over Bolt protocol, not REST. REST API exists but is less common. Bolt protocol requires driver.

name: Snowflake
description: Cloud data warehouse with SQL-based API and extensive integrations
gating_details: Free trial (400 credits). Pay-as-you-go for production. No approval needed for trial.
main_blocker: API is SQL-focused and database-oriented. Key pair JWT auth for automation is complex. REST API is thin wrapper around SQL.

name: MongoDB Atlas
description: Managed MongoDB database platform with Data API and admin REST API
gating_details: Free tier (M0: 512MB storage). Pay-as-you-go for more. Developer account free.
main_blocker: Admin API and Data API are separate. Admin API manages clusters; Data API (Atlas Data API) accesses data via HTTPS. Distinct auth models.

name: Datadog
description: Monitoring and observability platform with extensive REST API
gating_details: Free trial (full features, 14 days). Pay-as-you-go. API accessible during trial.
main_blocker: Two-key auth model (API + App key) adds setup complexity. Very broad API surface (100+ endpoints across many products). Rate limits on trial.

name: Sentry
description: Error tracking and performance monitoring platform with REST API
gating_details: Free tier (5k events/month, 1 user). Paid plans for more. Developer account free.
main_blocker: API is organized around projects/organizations. Event data queries can be complex. Rate limits on free tier.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace with REST API for pages, databases, and blocks
gating_details: Free Notion account + free integration creation. No approval needed for internal integrations.
main_blocker: Rate limits (3 req/sec for internal). API covers pages, databases, blocks but not all Notion features. No search endpoint in basic API.

name: Airtable
description: Spreadsheet-database hybrid with REST API and scripting capabilities
gating_details: Free tier (unlimited bases, 1k records/base). API accessible on free plan.
main_blocker: API is base/table/record oriented. Record limits on free plan. Webhook support limited. OAuth2 migration in progress.

name: Linear
description: Modern issue tracking and project management with GraphQL API
gating_details: Free tier (up to 10 users). API accessible on free plan. Developer account free.
main_blocker: GraphQL-only (no REST). Requires understanding of GraphQL queries. Rate limits on free tier.

name: Jira
description: Atlassian's industry-standard issue tracking and project management platform
gating_details: Free tier (up to 10 users). Cloud instance for development. Marketplace for apps.
main_blocker: Complex API with versioning quirks. Cloud vs Server API differences. OAuth scopes are granular but confusing. Rate limits on free tier.

name: Asana
description: Work management platform with REST API and GraphQL option
gating_details: Free tier (basic features). Developer account free. API accessible on free plan.
main_blocker: API covers tasks, projects, sections, but some operations need multiple calls. Rate limits: 150 req/min per PAT.

name: Monday.com
description: Visual project management platform with REST API and GraphQL
gating_details: Free tier (2 users, limited boards). Developer account free. API accessible on free plan.
main_blocker: API v1 vs v2 confusion. GraphQL API v2 is primary now. Board structure is flexible but complex to query.

name: ClickUp
description: All-in-one project management platform with extensive REST API
gating_details: Free Forever plan with API access. Paid plans for advanced features and higher limits.
main_blocker: API key only (no OAuth2 for native integrations). Very broad API but documentation quality varies. Rate limits: 100 req/min.

name: Coda
description: Collaborative document platform with REST API and packs (plugins)
gating_details: Free tier with API access. Packs development is free. Paid plans for doc size limits.
main_blocker: API is doc/table/row oriented. Packs are the extension mechanism, not a pure API. Smaller ecosystem.

name: Smartsheet
description: Enterprise work management platform with REST API
gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans required for ongoing API access. Developer docs accessible.
main_blocker: Enterprise-focused pricing. Sheet/row model is different from other PM tools. Some features require specific plan levels.

name: Harvest
description: Time tracking and invoicing platform with REST API
gating_details: Free tier (2 projects, unlimited time tracking). Paid plans for invoicing and team features.
main_blocker: Niche API focused on time tracking and expenses. Invoice and budget features limited on free plan.

name: Stripe
description: Global payment processing platform with one of the best-designed APIs in fintech
gating_details: Free to create account. Test mode available without live credentials. Pay-as-you-go pricing.
main_blocker: API key only for own account (Connect OAuth for third-party). Event-driven architecture (webhooks) for async operations. Idempotency keys required for safety.

name: Plaid
description: Financial data aggregation platform connecting apps to bank accounts
gating_details: Free Sandbox environment for development. Production requires going through Plaid's onboarding.
main_blocker: Sandbox vs Production access gating. OAuth re-auth flows are complex. Requires financial data regulations compliance.

name: Binance
description: Largest cryptocurrency exchange with extensive REST and WebSocket APIs
gating_details: Free Binance account. API key generation is free. Different verification levels grant different access.
main_blocker: HMAC signature generation for every request. WebSocket streams for real-time data. Regulatory restrictions in some regions.

name: Paygent Connect
description: Payment gateway powered by NMI (formerly Paygent)
gating_details: Requires merchant account and underwriting. No free developer tier. Partnership/contract needed.
main_blocker: Requires active merchant account. Limited public documentation. NMI-powered but rebranded, adds complexity.

name: iPayX
description: Payment processing and gateway platform
gating_details: Requires merchant account. No public free tier. Partnership likely needed.
main_blocker: Very limited public documentation. Requires payment processing account. Smaller platform with less developer focus.

name: QuickBooks
description: Intuit's accounting platform with OAuth2-based API
gating_details: Free developer account with sandbox companies. Production access requires QuickBooks subscription or Intuit partnership.
main_blocker: OAuth2 setup is more complex than typical (discovery URL, realm ID). Sandbox vs production migration has specific steps. Rate limits per realm.

name: Xero
description: Online accounting platform with REST API and OAuth2
gating_details: Free developer account (25 connections, 3 months free). Demo company available. Free tier accounting available.
main_blocker: OAuth2 with PKCE adds complexity. Tenant/connection model requires multi-org handling. API is accounting domain-specific.

name: Brex
description: Corporate card and spend management platform with REST API
gating_details: Brex account required. Free tier for startups. API accessible with account.
main_blocker: Requires active Brex account (business/corporate card). API is spend-and-expense focused. Some endpoints may need admin approval.

name: Ramp
description: Corporate spend management with REST API
gating_details: Ramp corporate account required. No free developer-only tier. API access included with account.
main_blocker: Requires active Ramp account (US business only). API is spend management focused. Newer API surface.

name: PitchBook
description: Private market data and research platform (no public API)
gating_details: Enterprise subscription required (very expensive). No free tier. Data provided via partnership agreements.
main_blocker: No public API. Data access is via enterprise license only. Partnership or data feed agreement required.

name: NotebookLM
description: Google's AI-powered research and note-taking assistant (limited API)
gating_details: Free to use via Google account. API access is limited - NotebookLM isn't designed as a developer platform.
main_blocker: NotebookLM has no public API for programmatic access. It's a consumer AI product, not a developer platform. Gemini API is the programmatic alternative.

name: Otter AI
description: AI meeting assistant with transcription and note-taking
gating_details: Free tier available. Otter API access may require Business or Enterprise plan.
main_blocker: Free tier API access may be limited. Meeting data access requires authorization. Transcription accuracy depends on audio quality.

name: Fathom
description: AI meeting assistant with real-time transcription and summarization
gating_details: Free tier available. API access may require paid plan.
main_blocker: Limited public API documentation. Fathom is primarily a consumer product with limited developer platform.

name: Consensus
description: AI search engine for scientific research papers
gating_details: Free tier available. API access may have usage limits on free tier.
main_blocker: Narrow API - focused on paper search and consensus measurement. Limited to academic research use case.

name: Reducto
description: AI-powered document parsing and extraction API
gating_details: Free tier available. Pay-as-you-go for more volume.
main_blocker: Narrow API surface - document parsing only. Purpose-built tool, not a platform.

name: Devin
description: AI software engineering agent platform with API and MCP
gating_details: Waitlist/beta access. Not fully open for self-serve yet. Limited availability.
main_blocker: Still in limited beta/waitlist. Not generally available. API surface is evolving.

name: higgsfield
description: AI content creation suite with CLI tools and API
gating_details: Free tier available. Paid plans for higher usage.
main_blocker: Smaller platform, limited public developer documentation. API surface may not cover all product features.

name: Mermaid CLI
description: CLI tool for generating diagrams from Markdown-like Mermaid syntax
gating_details: Open-source, free. Installed via npm. No cloud service.
main_blocker: Mermaid CLI is a local rendering tool, not an API platform. No cloud API to integrate with.

name: YouTube Transcript
description: API for fetching YouTube video transcripts/captions
gating_details: Free tier available. Pay-as-you-go for volume. No YouTube account needed.
main_blocker: Narrow API - transcripts only. Depends on YouTube captions being available. Language limitations.

name: Grain
description: AI meeting recording and highlight platform
gating_details: Free tier available. API access may require paid plan.
main_blocker: API surface is limited to meeting recordings and highlights. Smaller platform. Paid API access likely needed.
